title: Master Car Schema
description: Comprehensive car data schema for CarSpecio platform - scalable to 15,000+ models across multiple languages and applications

bodyStyle.description: Body style (sedan, hatchback, suv, coupe, convertible, wagon, pickup, etc.)

type.description: Steering type (e.g., 'Rack and Pinion', 'Electric Power', 'Hydraulic Power')

standingQuarterMile.description: Standing quarter mile time in seconds
